panels.title: 5xx rate (parley.byexec.com)
panels.description: Count of 5xx responses per interval from the DMZ nginx access log. Yellow at >=1, red at >=10.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="nginx-dmz", vhost="parley.byexec.com", status=~"5.."}[$__interval]))
sum(count_over_time({job="nginx-dmz", vhost="parley.byexec.com", status=~"2.."}[$__interval]))
sum(count_over_time({job="nginx-dmz", vhost="parley.byexec.com", status=~"4.."}[$__interval]))
sum(count_over_time({job="nginx-dmz", vhost="parley.byexec.com", status=~"5.."}[$__interval]))

panels.title: Top 5xx routes (1h)
panels.description: Top 10 API routes returning 5xx in the selected window. Path is extracted from the nginx access log line via the `pattern` parser; only /api/* routes are kept. CAVEAT: depends on the request line being present in the logged message; if the DMZ nginx log_format omits the request, this will return 0 rows.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (path) (count_over_time({job="nginx-dmz", vhost="parley.byexec.com", status=~"5.."} | pattern "<_> \"<method> <path> <_>\" <_>" [1h])))

panels.title: Latency p50/p95/p99 (STUB — needs nginx log_format)
panels.description: STUB PANEL. Requires the DMZ nginx log_format to include $upstream_response_time so we can unwrap it from the log line. Neither terraform/userdata-lb.sh (internal LB) nor the existing parley.json LogQL reference upstream_response_time, so this is not yet wired up. Add `$upstream_response_time` to the nginx-dmz log_format, ensure promtail/Loki ingests it, then this query becomes live. LogQL it WILL use is in the panel target.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.50, {job="nginx-dmz", vhost="parley.byexec.com"} | pattern "<_> upstream_response_time=<urt> <_>" | unwrap urt [$__interval])
quantile_over_time(0.95, {job="nginx-dmz", vhost="parley.byexec.com"} | pattern "<_> upstream_response_time=<urt> <_>" | unwrap urt [$__interval])
quantile_over_time(0.99, {job="nginx-dmz", vhost="parley.byexec.com"} | pattern "<_> upstream_response_time=<urt> <_>" | unwrap urt [$__interval])

panels.title: WS connections
panels.description: Active WebSocket connection count parsed from parley_stats lines. Uses last_over_time to show the most recent value within each step.

targets.expr: last_over_time({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap ws_conns [1m])

panels.title: Voice rooms
panels.description: Active voice room count parsed from parley_stats lines.

targets.expr: last_over_time({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap v_rooms [1m])

panels.title: Voice participants
panels.description: Total voice participants across all rooms parsed from parley_stats lines.

targets.expr: last_over_time({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap v_parts [1m])

panels.title: Heap MB
panels.description: Go heap allocation in MB parsed from parley_stats lines.

targets.expr: last_over_time({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap heap [1m])

panels.title: Goroutines
panels.description: Goroutine count parsed from parley_stats lines.

targets.expr: last_over_time({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap gr [1m])

panels.title: Broadcasts/sec
panels.description: Broadcast rate computed from the broadcasts_total counter. NOTE: counter resets at process restart — expect a brief drop or a clamped negative spike across restarts.

targets.expr: rate({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap b_total [1m])

panels.title: Recipients/sec
panels.description: Recipient rate computed from the recipients_total counter. NOTE: counter resets at process restart.

targets.expr: rate({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap r_total [1m])

panels.title: Avg recipients per broadcast
panels.description: Two series: broadcasts/sec (refA) and recipients/sec (refB). Visual ratio gives avg recipients per broadcast. A native math expression isn't used because Loki ad-hoc math expressions across two unwrap streams aren't reliable in older Grafana 10.x; eyeball the ratio for now.

targets.expr: rate({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap b_total [1m])

rate({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_stats:" | pattern "<_>parley_stats: ws_connections=<ws_conns> voice_rooms=<v_rooms> voice_participants=<v_parts> goroutines=<gr> heap_mb=<heap> broadcasts_total=<b_total> recipients_total=<r_total>" | unwrap r_total [1m])

panels.title: Sweep duration ms
panels.description: Per-tick voice sweep duration in milliseconds, parsed from parley_sweep lines.

targets.expr: last_over_time({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_sweep:" | pattern "<_>parley_sweep: duration_ms=<ms> evicted=<ev> channels=<ch>" | unwrap ms [1m])

panels.title: Evictions per tick
panels.description: Stale voice participants evicted per sweep tick.

targets.expr: last_over_time({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_sweep:" | pattern "<_>parley_sweep: duration_ms=<ms> evicted=<ev> channels=<ch>" | unwrap ev [1m])

panels.title: Channels scanned per tick
panels.description: Voice channels scanned per sweep tick.

targets.expr: last_over_time({host=~"parley-.*", job="journald"} |~ "parley_sweep:" | pattern "<_>parley_sweep: duration_ms=<ms> evicted=<ev> channels=<ch>" | unwrap ch [1m])
